source_formulae: P0R02932: The Impedance-Matching Operator and Causal Horizon

P0R02933: The seamless transduction of intent from the $\Psi$-field to the biological substrate requires Impedance Matching between the high-frequency quantum modes of Layer 1 and the slower neurochemical oscillations of Layer 2. We formalize this via the Transduction Impedance Operator ($\hat{Z}_L$), ensuring that the flow of negentropy does not result in local thermal destabilization.
P0R02936: def check_mereological_fusion(phi_A, phi_B, phi_AB, entanglement_entropy): """
P0R02937: Validates the Fusion Condition for panpsychist unity (L5 emergence).
P0R02938: Based on the Quantum Mereology formalism (Paper 0,).

P0R02939: """ # Fusion occurs only if integrated information of the whole # exceeds the sum of parts + entanglement overhead. is_fused = phi_AB > (phi_A + phi_B + entanglement_entropy) return { "status": "Irreducible Whole" if is_fused else "Fragmented Aggregate", "phi_gradient": phi_AB - (phi_A + phi_B), "mereological_stability": is_fused and entanglement_entropy > 0 }
